source_document.title: Borrowing by Mutual Funds
source_document.issuing_authority: Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI)
addressees: All Trustee Companies/ Board of Trustees of Mutual Funds
Association of Mutual Funds in India (AMFI)

notification.title: SEBI (Mutual Funds) Regulations, 2026
notification.context: Permits mutual funds to borrow funds for specific purposes and sets limits on borrowings.

regulation.title: SEBI (Mutual Funds) Regulations, 2026
regulation.context: Exempts intraday borrowings from the 20% limit subject to conditions specified by the Board.

regulation.title: SEBI (Mutual Funds) Regulations, 2026
regulation.context: 4.4. AMCs shall ensure compliance of clauses 6 and 7 of Fourth Schedule of SEBI (Mutual Funds) Regulations, 2026 and para 16.8 of SEBI Master Circular for Mutual Funds dated June 27, 2024.

regulation.title: SEBI (Mutual Funds) Regulations, 1996
regulation.context: This circular is issued in exercise of powers conferred under Section 11 (1) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India Act, 1992, read with the provisions of Regulation 77 of SEBI (Mutual Funds) Regulations, 1996, to protect the interest of investors in securities and to promote the development of, and to regulate the securities market.

master_circular.title: SEBI Master Circular for Mutual Funds
master_circular.context: 4.4. AMCs shall ensure compliance of clauses 6 and 7 of Fourth Schedule of SEBI (Mutual Funds) Regulations, 2026 and para 16.8 of SEBI Master Circular for Mutual Funds dated June 27, 2024.

master_circular.title: SEBI Master Circular for Mutual Funds
master_circular.context: 4.5. In line with para 10.9 of SEBI Master Circular for Mutual Funds dated June 27, 2024, cost of intraday borrowing, if any, shall be borne by the AMC. Further, any loss or cost incurred, on account of any unforeseen event or delay in receiving the funds from receivables as mentioned at para 4.3 shall be borne by the AMC.

circular.title: SEBI Circular
circular.context: 5. SEBI has introduced Closing Auction Session in the equity cash segment of the Stock Exchanges vide circular reference no. HO/47/11/11(3)2025-MRD-POD2/I/2765/2026 dated January 16, 2026, effective from August 03, 2026.

act.title: Securities and Exchange Board of India Act, 1992
act.context: This circular is issued in exercise of powers conferred under Section 11 (1) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India Act, 1992, read with the provisions of Regulation 77 of SEBI (Mutual Funds) Regulations, 1996, to protect the interest of investors in securities and to promote the development of, and to regulate the securities market.
